title: Objectives and business decisions
summary: 9609 AS — how stated objectives drive pricing, product, and investment decisions.
learningObjectives: Apply objectives to case study scenarios.

simpleExplanation.title: Objectives in action
simpleExplanation.summary: Managers may satisfice — accept adequate profit while pursuing growth or market share. Decisions should align with primary objective unless strategy shifts.
steps: Profit max → cut costs, raise prices if demand inelastic.
Conflicts: short-run profit vs long-run growth.

sections.content: **Objectives and decisions** (1.4.2) is classic **Paper 2** analysis — quote the case firm's objective before recommending action.

sections.label: Mark an objectives and decisions question
